name: @ttt-productions/realtime-core
description: Runtime-neutral GENERIC realtime primitives: wire envelopes + protocol version + stable error codes, reconnect/resume client state machine, versioned-apply projection/outbox/command appliers, generic Durable-Object persistence interfaces, and v1 SQLite table shapes. Zero TTT specifics.

scripts.prepublishOnly: npm run clean && npm run build

author: DJ (TTT Productions)
